Hair Stylist Careers in Ottawa
Join Salon Rouge

Salon Rouge is hiring hairstylists and colorists to join Ottawa's award-winning salon team in the ByWard Market. We offer competitive salary plus commission, ongoing professional education through Redken, Schwarzkopf, and Wella certification programs, and a clear career path from Junior Stylist to Platinum Artist. Located at 222 Dalhousie Street in downtown Ottawa, Salon Rouge provides stylists with a prestigious clientele, a beautiful modern workspace, and the mentorship of MasterStylist Amir, a three-time Schwarzkopf Academy Best Colorist winner.

Customer Sales Representative
Salon Rouge is currently seeking a Customer Sales Representative to join our ever-expanding team at our beautiful downtown location.
Our Customer Sales Representatives are fashion-forward, friendly, professional, and have a minimum of 5 years of sales experience. This role is ideal for someone who thrives in a fast-paced, client-focused environment and enjoys being part of a collaborative team.
Responsibilities include:
Selling salon services and professional retail products

Booking and managing guest appointments

Assisting guests throughout their salon visit

Retail and gift certificate sales

Point-of-sale transactions and cash handling

Maintaining an organized and welcoming front desk

Tidying and maintaining the salon and
